goal: Document the current Phase Scanner fixture coverage so reviewers can see which decisions and edge cases are already covered.
claims: BP-035 documents every current Phase Scanner input fixture.
BP-035 identifies covered decisions, checks, and remaining gaps.
BP-035 does not change runtime code, fixtures, package metadata, or external integration behavior.
assumptions: The fixture list in examples/phase-scanner is the current review corpus.
A human-readable coverage map is useful before adding more runtime behavior.
Machine-checking the map can follow in BP-036.
dod: The document lists all current Phase Scanner input fixtures.
The document maps fixtures to decision values and primary checks.
The document lists known coverage gaps.
stop_conditions: Runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-033 and BP-034 added reject and parallel-track review fixtures, making a coverage map useful.
